name: Double Chocolate Walnut Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper.
3. In a bowl, whisk together flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. In another bowl, beat butter and sugar until light and fluffy using an electric mixer.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Stir in the flour mixture to form a stiff dough.
7. Fold in chopped walnuts and chocolate chips.
8. Transfer the dough to the prepared baking sheet. Using floured hands, shape it into two logs about 12 inches long and 2 inches wide.
9. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
10. Bake for 35 minutes or until firm to the touch but still slightly soft in the center. Allow cooling on the baking sheet for 5 minutes.
11. Cut the cooled logs diagonally into 3/4-inch slices using a sharp knife.
12. Place cut sides down on the baking sheet and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until crisp.
13. Remove from oven and let cool completely on a wire rack.
14. Store in an airtight container at room temperature for up to one week, or freeze for up to one month.
